_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: there were no differences in the surveillance of WT and Nf1± microglia processes...surveillance indexes were similar in female WT (162.1 ± 6.5) and Nf1± (146.7 ± 6.3; p = 0.0907)
details: Female Nf1± mice showed no differences in microglial surveillance or ramification compared to WT females, demonstrating sexually dimorphic effects
